heading: Direct housing loans to Native American veterans; program authority
label: 3761 Direct housing loans to Native American veterans; program authority
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. Consultation With Advisory Committee on Native-American Veterans, , , which required the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to consider the views and recommendations, if any, of the Advisory Committee on Native-American Veterans in carrying out the direct housing loan pilot program, was repealed by , , .Pub. L. 102–547, § 8(b)106 Stat. 3640Pub. L. 109–233, title I, § 103(c)(2)120 Stat. 400Oct. 28, 1992June 15, 2006

Annual Reports on Pilot Program, , , directed Secretary of Veterans Affairs to transmit report relating to implementation of Native American veterans direct housing loan pilot program established under this subchapter to Committees on Veterans’ Affairs of Senate and House of Representatives not later than Feb. 1 of each of years 1994 through 1998, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 102–547, § 8(d)106 Stat. 3640Pub. L. 104–110, title II, § 201(b)110 Stat. 770Oct. 28, 1992Feb. 13, 1996

Authorization of Appropriations for Native American Veteran Housing Loans, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–547, § 8(e)106 Stat. 3640Oct. 28, 1992“New direct loan obligations for Native American veteran housing loans under subchapter V of chapter 37 of title 38, United States Code (as added by subsection (a)), may be incurred only to the extent that appropriations of budget authority to cover the anticipated cost, as defined in section 502 of the Congressional Budget Act of 1974 [], for such loans are made in advance. There is authorized to be appropriated for such purpose $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1993, which amount shall remain available without fiscal year limitation.”2 U.S.C. 661a

Authorization of Appropriations for Native American Veteran Housing Loans, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–547, § 8(e)106 Stat. 3640Oct. 28, 1992“New direct loan obligations for Native American veteran housing loans under subchapter V of chapter 37 of title 38, United States Code (as added by subsection (a)), may be incurred only to the extent that appropriations of budget authority to cover the anticipated cost, as defined in section 502 of the Congressional Budget Act of 1974 [], for such loans are made in advance. There is authorized to be appropriated for such purpose $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1993, which amount shall remain available without fiscal year limitation.”2 U.S.C. 661a

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary shall make direct housing loans to Native American veterans. The purpose of such loans is to permit such veterans to purchase, construct, or improve dwellings on trust land. The Secretary shall make such loans in accordance with the provisions of this subchapter.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary shall, to the extent practicable, make direct housing loans to Native American veterans who are located in a variety of geographic areas and in areas experiencing a variety of economic circumstances.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out this subchapter.
